system: OpenClaw Neural Intelligence v3.0 - Enterprise KB

key_concepts: Vision: 10-year aspirational state with measurable success criteria
Mission: Core purpose statement with customer promise
OKRs: Qualitative objectives + quantitative key results

metrics: MRR: Monthly Recurring Revenue = (New Customers × ARPU) + Existing MRR - Churned
CLV: Customer Lifetime Value = (ARPU × Gross Margin) / Churn Rate
CAC: Customer Acquisition Cost = Total Sales/Marketing Spend / New Customers
CAC Payback Period = CAC / (ARPU × Gross Margin)

frameworks: Porter's Five Forces (Entrants, Suppliers, Buyers, Substitutes, Rivalry)
PESTLE Analysis (Political, Economic, Social, Technological, Legal, Environmental)

models: Transformational Leadership (Idealized Influence, Inspirational Motivation, Intellectual Stimulation, Individualized Consideration)
Tuckman's Stages (Forming, Storming, Norming, Performing, Adjourning)

methodologies: MEDDIC Qualification (Metrics, Economic Buyer, Decision Criteria, Decision Process, Pain, Champion)
pricing: Value-Based: Price = Perceived Value × Willingness to Pay

decision_biases: Anchoring Effect: First info disproportionately influences
Availability Heuristic: Judging by ease of recall
Sunk Cost Fallacy: Continuing due to prior investment
Status Quo Bias: Preferring current state
Loss Aversion: Losses hurt more than equivalent gains

components: Self-Awareness: Emotional self-awareness, accurate self-assessment, self-confidence
Self-Management: Self-control, transparency, adaptability, achievement, initiative, optimism
Social-Awareness: Empathy, organizational awareness, service orientation
Relationship-Management: Developing others, inspirational leadership, influence, change catalyst, conflict management, building bonds, teamwork

frameworks: Maslow's Hierarchy: Physiological → Safety → Love → Esteem → Self-Actualization → Transcendence

strategies: Elaboration: Connect new info to existing knowledge
Testing Effect: Retrieval practice strengthens memory
